name: Chicken Tikka Masala
tagline: Charred yogurt-marinated chicken in creamy tomato-spice gravy

hero.alt: Chicken tikka masala in red-orange creamy gravy with cilantro
hero.caption: tikka masala — charred and creamy

healthFacts: Tikka means 'piece' — the chicken is meant to char.
Yogurt marinade tenderizes via enzymatic action.

steps.title: Marinate the tikka
steps.detail: Whisk yogurt, half the garlic-ginger paste, tandoori masala, salt. Coat chicken; rest 30 min (overnight is better).
steps.tip: Acid in yogurt = tender chicken. Don't shortcut the marinade.

steps.title: Char the chicken
steps.detail: Thread chicken on skewers or skewer-spread on a sheet. Broil close to the heat 10 min, turning, until charred edges. Set aside.
steps.tip: Edges should be black-spotted. That char is the soul of tikka.

steps.title: Build the masala
steps.detail: Melt butter in a wide pan. Cook onion 8 min until brown. Add remaining ginger-garlic 1 min. Add kashmiri chili, salt, tomato puree; cook 8 min until oil separates.
steps.tip: When oil pools at the edge of the gravy, the masala is properly cooked.

steps.title: Cream and finish
steps.detail: Stir in cream and 1/2 cup water. Add tikka chicken, simmer 5 min. Off heat, garam masala and kasuri methi crushed between palms.
steps.tip: Crushing kasuri methi releases its dried-fenugreek perfume — the iconic restaurant note.

media.alt: Finished tikka masala with kasuri methi
media.caption: cream and finish
